positive: A sophisticated minimalist design featuring stylized geometric mountain ranges silhouetted against a dramatic, vibrant sunset sky. The mountain peaks should have crisp, clean lines and varied heights, suggesting an abstract topographic map. Intertwining with the mountains are clean, abstract line art elements representing stylized constellations and celestial bodies (crescent moons, minimalist stars, arcs). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, soft gold, and deep violet. The composition should be centralized and balanced, designed to look excellent as a repeat pattern or single, impactful central graphic print on apparel. Studio lighting, vector art aesthetic, highly detailed, clean, symmetrical composition.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, noise, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, words, messy lines
